backend/main.mo: Main backend actor handling access control, user profiles, Stripe session management, and storage mixin integration.
feature_evidence.json: Report listing two frontend features with associated file paths, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries of numerous frontend files and pages for reference in build planning.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML entry point mounting the React app and loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router with all application routes including the new Sign Up page.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component with logo, quick links, social icons, and dark theme styling.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky navigation header with logo, route links, action buttons, and mobile menu.
Empty placeholder component file for a Hero 2D animation.
frontend/src/components/Hero3DScene.tsx: Empty or truncated file intended for a 3D scene component.
frontend/src/components/HeroIllustration: Renders a themed SVG network visualization with colored nodes arranged in a circle around a glowing central hexagon.
frontend/src/components/IoMPopup.tsx: Displays a styled modal with a title, content, and multiple sections using customizable colors.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Wraps the app with a header, footer, and routed main content area.
frontend/src/components/TMUIRESPopup.tsx: Shows a dark-themed popup with a title, description, and resource links, including buttons for external documentation and videos.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to the user's identity, invalidating related queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides authentication context via Internet Identity, handling login, logout, identity loading, and status management.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching user profile and resource-related content from the backend using the actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Configures Tailwind and defines custom color variables and utility classes for the app's dark theme.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the app with React, wrapping it in QueryClient and InternetIdentity providers.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page showing hero content, badges, navigation actions, and a popup with static IoM Hybrid Company details.
frontend/src/pages/ProjectsPage.tsx: Displays a list of static project cards with descriptions, media links, and optional popups using fetched TMU-IRES content.
frontend/src/pages/ResourcePage.tsx: Fetches and displays resource page content including architecture layers and user guides with mapped icons.
frontend/src/pages/RoadMapPage.tsx: Renders a multi-phase static roadmap with progress indicators, quarterly breakdowns, achievements, and target user counts.
frontend/src/pages/SignUpPage.tsx: Signup and sign‑in interface with token purchase calculator, form validation, and preset or custom contribution amounts.
frontend/src/pages/TokenomicsPage.tsx: Renders the Tokenomics page with supply info, staking tiers, and styled cards for token details and rewards.
frontend/src/pages/Web2Web3BridgePage.ts: Shows multiple Web2-to-Web3 use cases with selectable popups describing focus areas, benefits, and concerns.
frontend/src/pages/WhitePaperPage.tsx: Displays the whitepaper sections with scroll-based sidebar highlighting, navigation, and external resource buttons.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides helper functions to read, store, retrieve, and clear URL or session-based parameters.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures TailwindCSS theme extensions, colors, animations, and plugins for the project.
project_state.json: Tracks project state, required updates, existing features, and instructions for UI modifications and images.
